text.title: growth-youtube-strategy Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for growth-youtube-strategy as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Waiting for perfect production quality before publishing the first video.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The first 20 videos are the learning curve. Delaying publication delays the feedback needed to improve. Ship the first video this week.

failure-mode.description: Shooting Shorts-first with the intent to convert Shorts viewers to long-form subscribers.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Shorts and long-form require separate optimization strategies. A Shorts-first strategy does not convert viewers to long-form subscribers effectively — audiences treat them as different products.

failure-mode.description: Ignoring keyword research and publishing based on personal interest rather than search demand.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without keyword research, videos are not discoverable via search. Search-intent videos generate traffic for years; opinion videos depend on algorithmic push the channel has not yet earned.

failure-mode.description: Making intros longer than 30 seconds before delivering any value.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Viewers drop off during extended intros. Every second spent on credentials before the hook is a lost viewer. State credentials in one sentence, then deliver the promised value immediately.
